updated_claims.notes: Conflicting narratives and questions about the veracity of media (old footage) make claims about the Strait of Hormuz contested.

new_claims.claim_text: Iran unable to fully reopen the Strait of Hormuz due to unlocated mines.
new_claims.notes: Multiple sources report this claim, but independent verification is needed.

new_claims.claim_text: President Trump states the US has begun clearing mines from the Strait of Hormuz.
new_claims.notes: Claim from a political actor, requires independent verification.
